notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds into a double play, shortstop Bo Bichette to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Jared Young. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Michael Conforto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ hit by pitch. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson hits a grand slam (11) to left center field. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner scores. Miguel Amaya scores.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, third baseman Pedro Ramírez to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Francisco Alvarez to 3rd. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, third baseman Pedro Ramírez to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Francisco Alvarez to 3rd. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.
